sql_array: CREATE TABLE dt_test(`timestamp` Date32, `event_id` UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY timestamp;
UPDATE dt_test SET event_id = 10 WHERE timestamp = Date32('2023-10-02');
SELECT timestamp, event_id FROM dt_test WHERE event_id > 1;
DELETE FROM dt_test WHERE timestamp < Date32('2023-10-01');
